meta.poznamky: Seřaď 5 bloků: repeat(3){f90,l120} + penUp + forward(110) + penDown + repeat(3){f90,l120}. Oba trojúhelníky jsou rovnostranné, 90px strana, orientace nahoru. Start: (80,220) uhel 0.

cms.task_text: Seřaďte bloky tak, aby želva nakreslila [hlp]dva rovnostranné trojúhelníky[/hlp] vedle sebe s mezerou mezi nimi.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="pu1" x="20" y="20"></block><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r1" x="300" y="20"><value name="TIMES"><block type="math_number" id="mn1"><field name="NUM">3</field></block></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f1"><field name="DISTANCE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_left" id="lt1"><field name="ANGLE">120</field></block></next></block></statement></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="f2" x="20" y="180"><field name="DISTANCE">110</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="pd1" x="300" y="200"></block><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r2" x="20" y="320"><value name="TIMES"><block type="math_number" id="mn2"><field name="NUM">3</field></block></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f3"><field name="DISTANCE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_left" id="lt2"><field name="ANGLE">120</field></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r1" x="20" y="20"><value name="TIMES"><block type="math_number" id="mn1"><field name="NUM">3</field></block></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f1"><field name="DISTANCE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_left" id="lt1"><field name="ANGLE">120</field></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="pu1"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="f2"><field name="DISTANCE">110</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="pd1"><next><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r2"><value name="TIMES"><block type="math_number" id="mn2"><field name="NUM">3</field></block></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f3"><field name="DISTANCE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_left" id="lt2"><field name="ANGLE">120</field></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
